headline: 1 Cash-Heavy Stock to Target This Week and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: A surplus of cash can mean financial stability, but it can also indicate a reluctance (or inability) to invest in growth. Some of these companies also face challenges like stagnating revenue, declining market share, or limited scalability.

raw.headline: 1 Cash-Heavy Stock to Target This Week and 2 That Underwhelm
raw.summary: A surplus of cash can mean financial stability, but it can also indicate a reluctance (or inability) to invest in growth. Some of these companies also face challenges like stagnating revenue, declining market share, or limited scalability.

headline: Williams-Sonoma Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Miss, Comps Up Y/Y
summary: WSM beats on Q4 EPS but misses revenue estimates as sales decline despite comps growth and steady margins against a tough macro backdrop.

raw.headline: Williams-Sonoma Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Miss, Comps Up Y/Y

headline: Expedia Group Rises 20% in a Month: Time to Buy the Stock?
summary: EXPE shares jump 20% in a month as strong B2B growth, rising cash flow and margin expansion highlight improving fundamentals.

raw.headline: Expedia Group Rises 20% in a Month: Time to Buy the Stock?

headline: BKNG's Merchant Model Anchors Growth: Can it Drive Upside?
summary: Booking Holdings leans on its merchant model to drive growth and control, but rising costs and demand uncertainty may shape how much upside it can deliver.

headline: These 3 highly successful CEOs have 1 soft skill in common—it shows up in different ways: ‘I just think it’s a good process’
summary: Lowe's CEO Marvin Ellison, YouTube CEO Neal Mohan and billionaire businessman Barry Diller credit much of their success to different forms of listening skills.
